name: water-bubble
short_effect: Halves damage from Fire moves, doubles damage of Water moves, and prevents burns.
effect_text: When this Pokémon is hit by a Fire move, the damage is halved.  When this Pokémon uses a Water move, the power is doubled. This Pokémon cannot be burned, and if it becomes burned, the burn is immediately cured.
flavor_text: Lowers the power of Fire-type moves that hit the Pokémon and prevents it from being burned.
